title: await should be avoided redundantly
description: "await" should not be used redundantlyAnalyze your codeintentionality-clearmaintainabilityCode SmellQuick FixIDE quick fixes available with SonarQube for IDEredundantWhy is this an issue?Anasyncfunction always wraps the return value in aPromise. Usingreturn awaitis not required and comes at an extra performance cost. However, you might wish to keep it as it preserves the function call in the stack trace in case an error is thrown asynchronously.Noncompliant code exampleasync function foo() { // ..
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Avoid redundant await in return statements - return the promise directly.
